content.text: I'll implement the minimal code needed to make the reproduction test pass while keeping all other tests green.
Now I need to add reproduction logic. The current implementation only filters existing live cells. I need to also include dead cells that have exactly 3 live neighbors.

content.text:
All 6 tests pass (3 still as todo).

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added reproduction logic by iterating over each live cell's neighbors, identifying dead positions (not in live set, not already counted), and including those with exactly 3 live neighbors as new live cells in the next generation.
**Result**: All tests now pass (6 passing, 3 todo)
**Approach**: Reused existing `countLiveNeighbors` helper. Only checked dead positions adjacent to live cells (since dead cells with no live neighbors can never have 3 live neighbors). Used inline deduplication to avoid adding the same dead cell twice.

Relevant file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-14_21-41-52_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
